channel.title: Canadian Health Monitor
channel.description: Weekly Canadian EMR, EHR, digital health, privacy, cybersecurity, CIHI, Infoway, and regulatory updates.

item.title: N.L. health-care workers got an email promising a day off — but it was only a cybersecurity test
item.description: Source: CBC Health Matched keywords: digital health Published: Wed, 17 Jun 2026 09:35:14 EDT

item.title: Canada to create Health Sector Data Space — CIHI named as part of the government’s AI strategy
item.description: Source: Canadian Institute for Health Information Matched keywords: CIHI, health data Published: June 10, 2026
